label: strong

card.title: LRUCache<K,V> with capacity eviction
card.description: A small least-recently-used cache for the API response layer.
card.technicalNotes: Typed, no deps. get/set/has/delete; evict least-recently-used at capacity; get() refreshes recency. Tested.
isc: Exports an LRUCache class with get/set/has/delete methods
Evicts the least-recently-used entry when capacity is exceeded
get() refreshes the recency of the accessed key
Tests cover eviction order and recency refresh
